meta.title: MESSI — The GOAT
meta.description: An interactive tribute to Lionel Messi: his journey, his trophies, and the records that made him the Greatest Of All Time.

hero.subtitle: From a small boy in Rosario to football's eternal king. One ball, one left foot, and a legacy that will never be repeated.

timeline.title: The Trajectory
timeline.subtitle: Every legend has a path. His began on a dusty pitch in Rosario and never stopped climbing.

grandoli.title: The Beginning in Rosario
grandoli.description: At age five, a young Leo starts kicking a ball for Grandoli, coached by his own father. He soon moves to Newell's Old Boys, dazzling everyone with a talent no one his age had ever shown.

hormone.title: Overcoming Adversity
hormone.description: Diagnosed with a growth hormone deficiency, Messi faces a costly treatment his family cannot fully afford. The obstacle becomes the first test of a will that would define his entire career.

arrival.title: A Napkin and a Dream
arrival.description: At 13, Messi travels to Barcelona for a trial. Convinced of his talent, the club's sporting director famously signs the first contract on a paper napkin, changing football history forever.

barcelona.title: Building an Legend
barcelona.description: Seventeen unforgettable seasons in Blaugrana. Four Champions Leagues, ten La Liga titles, and hundreds of goals that turned the Camp Nou into his personal stage and Messi into the best player of his generation.

psg.title: A New Chapter in Paris
psg.description: An emotional and unexpected farewell to Barcelona leads Messi to Paris, where he continues collecting titles and, crucially, keeps his date with history at the World Cup.

worldcup.title: World Champion
worldcup.description: December 18th, 2022, Lusail. After a final for the ages against France, Argentina lifts the World Cup. Messi is crowned champion of the world, completing football's most storied career.

miami.title: Conquering the United States
miami.description: Messi arrives in Florida and instantly reshapes American soccer, winning trophies from his very first months and sparking a wave of global attention for the league.

trophies.title: Trophy Room
trophies.subtitle: A collection unmatched in the history of the sport — club, country, and individual glory combined like never before.

worldCup.name: FIFA World Cup
worldCup.detail: Qatar 2022 — the crown that completed the GOAT's legacy.

ballonDor.name: Ballon d'Or
ballonDor.detail: A record 8 wins — no other player is even close.

copaAmerica.name: Copa América
copaAmerica.detail: Champion with Argentina, ending an 28-year national drought.

championsLeague.name: UEFA Champions League
championsLeague.detail: Four European crowns lifted with FC Barcelona.

laLiga.name: La Liga
laLiga.detail: Ten domestic league titles won in Spain.

goldenShoe.name: European Golden Shoe
goldenShoe.detail: A record six-time top scorer across Europe's leagues.

olympicGold.name: Olympic Gold Medal
olympicGold.detail: Beijing 2008, champion with the Argentina U-23 squad.

stats.title: The GOAT Stats
stats.subtitle: Records that redefine what's possible on a football pitch — numbers no one else has ever reached.
stats.note: All figures reflect career totals across club and international football.

laLigaGoals.label: La Liga Goals
laLigaGoals.context: All-time top scorer in Spain's top flight

hatTricks.label: Career Hat-tricks
hatTricks.context: Including 8 four-goal games and 1 five-goal game

copaAmericaGoals.label: Copa América Goals
copaAmericaGoals.context: All-time top scorer in the tournament's history

assistsAllTime.label: Career Assists
assistsAllTime.context: The greatest playmaker of his era

freeKicks.label: Direct Free-kick Goals
freeKicks.context: Among the deadliest set-piece takers ever

footer.tagline: A tribute built for the fans, in every language, for the GOAT.
footer.rights: Unofficial fan tribute. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
